findings.title: CLI permission-mode override is ineffective in OpenHarness 0.1.9
findings.detail: The CLI passes permission_mode into Settings.merge_cli_overrides, but Settings stores the effective mode under permission.mode. The override becomes an unused top-level field and effective mode remains default. The same merge path is used by dry-run and live runtime construction.

findings.title: OS-level sandbox is disabled by default
findings.detail: PermissionChecker provides policy gating, but SandboxSettings.enabled defaults to false. Policy checks are not equivalent to process-level filesystem or network isolation.
